creator: Jeff Foster

evidence.text: Culture matters. If you're not working to build a generative culture at your organization you're in neglect. A generative culture is an incredibly powerful tool for transforming the way your organization works. The way to shape culture isn't stand up and give a rousing Churchillian speech. It's to change how you work. It's to introduce new things, try new ideas out. Did this work for Redgate as a whole? If I take those three examples that, organizationally, culture should improve? Did it improve our job satisfaction? Yes. I don't know whether it's correlation or causation.

title: How We Built a Generative Culture at Redgate
